name_it: Saints Paul Miki and companions, martyrs
name_en: Saints Paul Miki and companions, martyrs
name_es: Saints Paul Miki and companions, martyrs
name_pt: Saints Paul Miki and companions, martyrs
bio_en: Paul Miki, SJ was a Japanese Catholic evangelist and Jesuit, known for his martyrdom during a 16th-century anti-Catholic uprising.
bio_it: Paul Miki, SJ was a Japanese Catholic evangelist and Jesuit, known for his martyrdom during a 16th-century anti-Catholic uprising.
bio_es: Paul Miki, SJ was a Japanese Catholic evangelist and Jesuit, known for his martyrdom during a 16th-century anti-Catholic uprising.
bio_pt: Paul Miki, SJ was a Japanese Catholic evangelist and Jesuit, known for his martyrdom during a 16th-century anti-Catholic uprising.
